title: Basic Backpack
description: Adds a wearable backpack with easy access.
body:
Adds the **Backpack** item to Minecraft.

#### _Interaction_ Interact with in your hand to open. Or equip to your chest slot and use a hotkey to open.

#### _Crafting_ Crafted with 8 leather and 1 chest. Combine 1 backpack and 1 dye to recolor.

#### _Compatibilities_ This mod is singleplayer and multiplayer friendly. Required on client and server if using on a server. This is a Fabric mod, requiring Fabric API.
